name: tessl
description: Tessl CLI toolkit for agent-native, spec-driven development — create, develop, lint, pack, and publish Tessl plugins and skills to the Tessl registry. Use when running tessl commands, authoring SKILL.md or rules, installing plugins, or publishing on push via setup-tessl CI.

interface.shortDescription: Tessl CLI toolkit for agent-native, spec-driven development — create, develop, lint, pack, and publish Tessl plugins and skills to the Tessl registry
interface.longDescription: Tessl CLI toolkit for agent-native, spec-driven development — create, develop, lint, pack, and publish Tessl plugins and skills to the Tessl registry. Use when running tessl commands, authoring SKILL.md or rules, installing plugins, or publishing on push via setup-tessl CI.
defaultPrompt: Help me use Tessl for my current task.
